message:
test(security): add unit tests for HMAC-signed user ID cookie module

13 tests covering: create+parse roundtrip, UUID support, signature
uniqueness, empty/null/whitespace rejection, missing dot separator,
empty signature, tampered user ID, tampered signature, oversized ID,
whitespace validation, cookie format, and base64url encoding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
